rows.title: Catalonia's APDCAT Reports 1,374 Privacy Complaints in 2025, Up 21% on 2024 and 123% Since 2022
rows.summary: APDCAT reported 1,374 complaints/rights claims in 2025 (+21% YoY, +123% since 2022). 837 cases investigated (after AEPD-jurisdiction transfers). 138 sanctioning procedures opened. 126 resolutions: 110 against public-sector entities (declarations only), 12 against private-sector entities carrying total fines of €409,352; 10 of 12 sanctioned entities had paid by report drafting.
rows.body_name: Autoritat Catalana de Protecció de Dades

rows.title: Catalonia's APDCAT Joins 61-Authority GPA Statement on Privacy Risks of AI-Generated Images and Videos
rows.summary: APDCAT subscribed to a joint statement of 61 data protection authorities (coordinated by GPA's International Enforcement Working Group) addressing privacy risks of AI-generated images/videos depicting identifiable individuals without consent. Sets expectations for organisations developing and deploying AI generation systems; co-signatories will share enforcement, policy, and education approaches.
rows.body_name: Autoritat Catalana de Protecció de Dades
